title: Non-Stop Hits
desc: A comprehensive compilation of well-known Bollywood songs to showcase a variety of melodies and styles from the Indian film industry.

title: Gurbani
desc: A spiritual leader guides the congregation in prayer through a comprehensive compilation of hymns from the Guru Granth Sahib.

title: Nava Nakor
desc: A thoughtfully curated selection of the latest and most popular Punjabi songs, sung by renowned artists, played back to back to entertain the audience.
